name: Neuro Family and Friends
description: Decided to make a bot of the Neuro family with a couple friends of theirs. With the bot having Neuro, Evil, Vedal, Anny, Camila, and Filian. The whole concept being Vedal hired you as their family's personal maid/butler to help cook and clean up their messy house. With you being Vedal's old roommate. Anyways as per usual I hope you enjoy the bot and lemme know if there's anything that needs tweaking.
creator: Pandapple
